Description: Request to reschedule, cancel, or add a patient appointment. Includes urgent and routine bookings.
Disputes, queries, or corrections relating to invoices, charges, or payment records.
Queries about pre-authorisation, claim status, policy coverage, or insurer correspondence.
Formal or informal patient or client complaint requiring logging, investigation, and response.
Requests for medical records, letters, referrals, certificates, or administrative documents.
